about_bio: Born in Istanbul on October 10, 1997. I embarked on my hairdressing career at a young age and have been dedicated to this profession for over 16 years. Throughout this journey, I developed my skills working in different salons and gained extensive experience in salon management for approximately 7 years, giving me a comprehensive understanding of the industry both as a practitioner and as a leader.
about_bio2: In the later stages of my career, I gained partnership experience and, by combining all the knowledge, expertise, and vision I acquired, I began serving clients in my own salon starting in 2023.
about_bio3: I have specialized in women's hair design, particularly focusing on color transformations, blonde tones, special occasion styling, hair extensions, and modern techniques. I believe every client possesses a unique personal style, and in every service I provide, my goal is to bring out and enhance this individuality.
about_bio4: For me, this profession is not merely about creating beautiful hair; it is about making a difference in every person I work with and helping them feel stronger and more confident.
about_bio5: As Fatih Kurt, my mission is to exceed standards, provide each client with a personalized experience, and leave a lasting impression through every service I deliver.
about_vision_text: To be an innovative and inspiring brand that makes a difference in the beauty industry.
about_vision_text2: As Fatih Kurt Hair Artist, our goal is to become a brand that sets trends not only in our region but throughout the industry, distinguished by its quality and style. We continuously apply the latest techniques to provide our clients with an extraordinary experience beyond the ordinary.
about_mission_text: To provide every client with quality and reliable service that makes them feel special.
about_mission_text2: Prioritizing hair health, creating personalized solutions, and ensuring maximum satisfaction in every service is our highest priority. Through our genuine approach and professional perspective, we ensure that everyone who leaves our salon feels stronger and more confident.
af_model_text: We determine the most flattering style for you together and apply it with precision.
af_glow_text: The latest techniques and highest quality products to achieve your dream color.
af_health_text: Specialized care for healthy and lustrous hair from roots to ends, inside and out.
af_online_text: Booking and service purchases through our online platform, anytime, anywhere.

shop_hero_desc: Bring professional hair care to your home. Carefully curated products by Fatih Kurt.
shop_tip1_title: How to Choose the Right Shampoo?
shop_tip1_desc: Choosing shampoo according to your hair type is the foundation of healthy hair. Opt for sulfate-free formulas for colored hair and balancing formulas for oily hair.
shop_tip2_title: When Should You Use Hair Mask?
shop_tip2_desc: Applying a mask once a week deeply nourishes your hair. Let the mask sit for 10-15 minutes before rinsing for best results.
shop_tip3_title: How to Protect Your Hair Color?
shop_tip3_desc: Do not wash your hair for 48 hours after coloring. Rinsing with cool water slows down color fading. Using color-protective shampoo is essential.
shop_tip4_desc: Always apply a heat protectant before using a blow dryer, flat iron, or curling iron. This small step keeps your hair much healthier in the long run.
shop_tip5_desc: Healthy hair comes from a healthy scalp. A scalp massage once a week increases blood circulation and supports hair growth.
